chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-970 of 2023 (Mr. M. Rizwan Yasin v. Dr. Faiza Mushtaque and others) ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection as at A 2. For orders on CMA No.2930/2024 3. For hearing of CMA No.7037/2023 4. For hearing of CMA No.7038/2023 5. For hearing of CMA No.7039/2023 6. For hearing of main case 15.12.2025 Mr. Fayyaz Aslam, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ghulam Mujtaba Phull, advocate for the respondent --------- Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro, J. Through this petition, the petitioner has challenged the order dated 11.08.2023 passed by the learned District Judge Malir, Karachi, whereby an application filed under Section 151 & 152 read with Order 47 of Code of Civil Procedure, 1908, was dismissed. 2. It was the grievance of the petitioner that judgment dated 23.10.2021 passed in G&W Appeal No.15/2018 was sought through misrepresentation. The record reflects that the judgment dated 23.10.2021 was passed on basis of compromise arrived at between parties and on the basis of said compromise, G&W Appeal was withdrawn by the petitioner. 3. Since the appeal was disposed of on the basis of compromise which was signed by the petitioner himself and the counsel, no case for indulgence is made out and counsel for the petitioner has failed to point out any illegality or infirmity in the order dated 11.08.2023. This petition being misconceived is dismissed alongwith pending application(s). JUDGE Nadir*
